sections.label: Verse 1
lines: A hoihna Avangliatna gen zawh hilo,
Amuanhuai bel Topau
Hunte kikhelin a kisiat hang,
Cik mah hun na kikhel ngei kei
Leitung maingat in Amah thudon kei zong
Hong itna kip lai zen.
Nau bangin nong kepna lianlua e,
Lungdam in Topa kong phat hi

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Na ziatlam khut tawh
Keimah nong makaih a,gun galkhat ah,
Haksatna guampi galkhat dongah
Na ciangkhut in keimah lam ong lah manin,
A bei theilo athak itna tawh kei nong it a,
A tul theilo na hehpihna lian kong phat hi.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Na sung ka nuntak a kipan tuciang dong
Awn sukin an nong pia,
Lungsim kha laulo in ka han na'ng
Nong pua hi, na liangko tungah
Ka lungsim tawnga ka ngaihsut khempeuh te
Siit loin nong pia a
Ka mailam ding nong gelsak khempeuh
Asia omlo hoihna bek hi.
